title: Origin: Bloodhound
description: Role to hunt players and create mini-games. Allows you to find players who are running and start hunting.
body:
**- A role to play with friends. Allows you to search for people using your passive ability to see people running, climbing or swimming, as well as during midnight. The active ability allows you to hunt - the player you hunt will be weaker and less able to see; if you hunt during midnight, the hunt will be enhanced and you will get positive effects.**
- Skills:
1. Always watching: You see players who are running, swimming, climbing or on fire.
2. A glimpse into midnight: During midnight, you can see well.
3. A murderer's gaze at midnight: You see all your victims at midnight.
4. A new victim: By using primary and looking at the nearest player you will start hunting him; in this state the player will not see well, he will be weak and he will be constantly illuminated. If you use the ability without hitting the nearest player, the ability will be wasted.
If you use this ability at midnight, you will begin a night hunt.
5. Night Hunt: A version of the New Victim ability that enhances the victim's slowing effects, as well as giving you positive effects in the form of Strength, Regeneration, and Resistance.
